user.title: Lipro Account
user.description: Please enter your Lipro account credentials.

data_description.remember_password_hash: If enabled, store the password MD5 hash in Home Assistant storage to allow automatic re-login when refresh tokens expire. Disable to reduce local exposure; you may need to re-authenticate later.
If enabled, store the password MD5 hash in Home Assistant storage to allow automatic re-login when refresh tokens expire. Disable to reduce local exposure; you may need to re-authenticate later.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to Lipro server
error.invalid_phone: Invalid phone number format (must be 6-20 digits, optionally starting with +)
error.reauth_user_mismatch: This account does not match the integration entry. Please re-authenticate with the same Lipro account.

data_description.scan_interval: How often to poll device status from the cloud (10-300 seconds).
data_description.mqtt_enabled: Use MQTT for instant device state updates. Disable if you experience connection issues.
data_description.enable_power_monitoring: Query power consumption for outlet devices. Disable to reduce API calls.
data_description.anonymous_share_enabled: Anonymously share device information to help developers support more device types.
data_description.anonymous_share_errors: Share anonymous error reports to help fix issues faster.
data_description.show_advanced: Configure advanced settings like timeouts, query intervals, and debug logging.

advanced.title: Advanced Settings
advanced.description: These settings are for advanced users. Default values work well for most setups.

data.light_turn_on_on_adjust: Auto turn on when adjusting brightness/color temp while off
data.room_area_sync_force: Force sync HA area from cloud room

data_description.power_query_interval: Default 300 seconds (~5 minutes). How often to query power data for outlets (30-300 seconds). Only applies when power monitoring is enabled.
data_description.request_timeout: Timeout for API requests (10-60 seconds). Increase if you have a slow network.
data_description.debug_mode: Capture a sanitized runtime diagnostics report with recent command traces. Enabling this also enables verbose logging.
data_description.light_turn_on_on_adjust: If enabled, adjusting brightness or color temperature while the light is off will also turn it on. If disabled, adjustments will not turn the light on.
data_description.room_area_sync_force: Default off (recommended): preserve user-customized HA areas and use cloud room as fallback. Turn on to always let cloud room overwrite HA area.
data_description.command_result_verify: Default on (recommended): poll cloud-reported command result status via msgSn and return clearer failures when no clear success state is observed within the retry budget. Turn off to trust pushSuccess for lower latency.
data_description.device_filter_home_mode: Select how to apply home filter: off/include/exclude.
data_description.device_filter_home_list: Home or room names / home IDs. Matching is case-insensitive. Supports comma, semicolon, or newline separators.
data_description.device_filter_model_mode: Select how to apply model filter: off/include/exclude.
data_description.device_filter_model_list: Model identifiers (physicalModel/iotName/model/productModel). Matching is case-insensitive. Supports comma, semicolon, or newline separators.
data_description.device_filter_ssid_mode: Select how to apply WiFi SSID filter: off/include/exclude.
data_description.device_filter_ssid_list: WiFi SSID values. Matching is case-insensitive. Supports comma, semicolon, or newline separators.
data_description.device_filter_did_mode: Select how to apply device ID filter: off/include/exclude.
data_description.device_filter_did_list: Device identifiers (did/deviceDid/deviceId/iotDeviceId/serial). Matching is case-insensitive. Supports comma, semicolon, or newline separators.

send_command.name: Send Command
send_command.description: Send a raw command to a Lipro device. This is an advanced service for power users who want to test new commands or access features not yet supported by the integration.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: The device serial number or mesh group ID. If not provided, the device will be determined from the target entity.

command.name: Command
command.description: The command to send to the device.

properties.name: Properties
properties.description: Optional list of property key-value pairs to send with the command.

get_schedules.name: Get Schedules
get_schedules.description: Get recurring weekly schedules for a device. Weekdays use 1=Monday through 7=Sunday. For mesh groups, reads use BLE gateway/member candidates only; real-device retests show standard schedule/get.do may return empty success for the group ID and may also echo shadow rows with non-reusable IDs for member IoT IDs, so it is not treated as a reliable mesh fallback.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: The device serial number or mesh group ID. If not provided, the device will be determined from the target entity.

add_schedule.name: Add Schedule
add_schedule.description: Add a recurring weekly timing schedule for a device. No absolute-date schedule mode is exposed. For mesh groups, writes use BLE gateway/member candidates only; real-device retests show standard schedule/addOrUpdate.do returns service errors for member IoT IDs and is not a reliable mesh fallback.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: The device serial number or mesh group ID. If not provided, the device will be determined from the target entity.

days.name: Days
days.description: List of weekdays for the recurring schedule (1=Monday, 7=Sunday).

times.name: Times
times.description: List of times in seconds from midnight (0-86399), matching the app's 24-hour hour/minute UI.

events.name: Events
events.description: List of event codes corresponding to each time.

delete_schedules.name: Delete Schedules
delete_schedules.description: Delete timing schedules from a device by their IDs. For mesh groups, deletes use BLE gateway/member candidates only; real-device retests show standard schedule/delete.do can fail with 140003 for member readback IDs and does not reliably remove the target mesh schedule.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: The device serial number or mesh group ID. If not provided, the device will be determined from the target entity.

schedule_ids.name: Schedule IDs
schedule_ids.description: List of schedule IDs to delete.

submit_anonymous_share.name: Submit Anonymous Share Report
submit_anonymous_share.description: Manually submit the anonymous device share report. This sends anonymized device information and error reports to help improve the integration.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional config entry id to scope the anonymous share submission.

get_anonymous_share_report.name: Get Anonymous Share Report
get_anonymous_share_report.description: Preview the anonymous share report data that would be submitted. Use this to review what information will be shared.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional config entry id to preview one scoped anonymous share report.

get_developer_report.name: Get Developer Report
get_developer_report.description: Export a sanitized runtime diagnostics report for real-device debugging. Includes mesh topology snapshot, panel capability snapshot, IR remote inventory snapshot, recent command traces, and runtime options.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional config entry id to export one scoped developer report.

submit_developer_feedback.name: Submit Developer Feedback
submit_developer_feedback.description: One-click submit sanitized developer diagnostics to the share worker. Optionally include a note for easier triage.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Optional config entry id to scope the developer feedback upload.

note.name: Note
note.description: Extra context about what you observed during the test.

query_command_result.name: Query Command Result
query_command_result.description: Developer-only optional capability. Query cloud-reported command result status by msgSn with bounded polling inside the default retry budget. Actual attempts may be lower than max_attempts because exponential backoff is clipped by the time budget.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: The device serial/group ID. If omitted, the target entity is used.

msg_sn.name: Message SN
msg_sn.description: Command message serial number returned by send command response.

max_attempts.name: Max Attempts
max_attempts.description: Maximum query attempts within the retry budget. Default 6; set to 1 for a single-shot check.

time_budget_seconds.name: Time Budget (Seconds)
time_budget_seconds.description: Total retry budget in seconds. Default 3.0; set to 0 to disable polling and perform a single-shot query.

get_city.name: Get City
get_city.description: Developer-only optional capability. Query cloud city metadata using the verified empty-object ({}) payload contract.

query_user_cloud.name: Query User Cloud
query_user_cloud.description: Developer-only optional capability. Query user cloud metadata using the verified raw empty-body contract (`-d ''`). Tested responses may contain only a top-level data field without a code wrapper.

fetch_body_sensor_history.name: Fetch Body Sensor History
fetch_body_sensor_history.description: Developer-only optional capability. Fetch body sensor history payload for debugging.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: The gateway/group device ID. If omitted, the target entity is used.

mesh_type.name: Mesh Type
mesh_type.description: Mesh type value expected by API contract. Default is "2".

fetch_door_sensor_history.name: Fetch Door Sensor History
fetch_door_sensor_history.description: Developer-only optional capability. Fetch door sensor history payload for debugging.

device_id.name: Device ID
device_id.description: The gateway/group device ID. If omitted, the target entity is used.

mesh_type.name: Mesh Type
mesh_type.description: Mesh type value expected by API contract. Default is "2".

refresh_devices.name: Refresh Devices
refresh_devices.description: Force a full Lipro device list refresh for all loaded entries or one specific config entry.

entry_id.name: Entry ID
entry_id.description: Reload only the specified Lipro config entry. If omitted, all loaded Lipro entries are refreshed.

auth_expired.message: Your Lipro session has expired. Please re-authenticate.

no_device_specified.message: No device_id or target entity specified.

cannot_determine_device.message: Could not determine device from target entity.

command_failed.message: Failed to send command to device.

command_device_not_connected.message: Device is not connected. Check the device network and try again.

command_device_busy.message: Device is busy. Please wait a moment and try again.

command_device_offline.message: Device appears offline or unavailable. Try refreshing device status.

command_push_failed.message: Cloud accepted the command but push delivery failed.

times_events_mismatch.message: The number of times must match the number of events.

anonymous_share_not_enabled.message: Anonymous share is not enabled. Enable it in the integration options first.

anonymous_share_submit_failed.message: Failed to submit anonymous share report.

developer_feedback_submit_failed.message: Failed to submit developer feedback report.

entry_not_found.message: Config entry not found or not loaded: {entry_id}

developer_mode_not_enabled.message: Developer diagnostics are disabled. Enable debug mode first.

firmware_no_update.message: No firmware update is currently available for this device.

firmware_version_mismatch.message: Requested firmware version {version} is not available.

firmware_unverified_confirm_required.message: This firmware is not certified. Click install again within {seconds} seconds to confirm.

firmware_install_unsupported.message: The cloud did not provide an install command for this firmware package.

mqtt_disconnected.message: MQTT has been disconnected for {minutes} minutes. Real-time updates are unavailable, falling back to polling.

auth_expired.title: Lipro Authentication Expired
auth_expired.description: Your Lipro session has expired. Please re-authenticate.

mqtt_disconnected.title: Lipro MQTT Disconnected
mqtt_disconnected.description: MQTT has been disconnected for {minutes} minutes. Real-time updates are unavailable, falling back to polling.
